name: Sporous Spray Spell
description: Notes This spell is highly unique in the sense that instead of causing an explosion of shots, it spawns a Deadly Mushroom that continuously explodes for a time period.
effects: Creates a Deadly Mushroom that lasts 4.8 seconds. Damage Nova: explodes 4 times every 1.2 seconds for 5 (+1 per 10 WIS over 42) seconds. Deadly Mushroom: 800 (+9 per WIS over 42) damage within 3 (+1 per 28.5 WIS over 42) sqrs every 1.2 seconds
